heading: How It Works
description: We calculate your Market Compensation Alignment (MCA) Score in three steps.

1.heading: Input Your Details
1.body: Tell us your job title, location, and current salary. Our smart autocomplete matches you against official industry SOC codes to ensure your benchmarking is laser-accurate.

2.heading: The Triangulation Engine
2.body: Our algorithm cross-references your data against three distinct sources: official ONS government benchmarks, broader national economic trends, and over 700,000+ live UK job listings from Adzuna.

3.heading: Your MCA Score
3.body: You receive a definitive MCA Score from 1-99. Instantly see if you are a Market Leader, Highly Competitive, or Below Market, with a detailed breakdown to help you negotiate your true value.

benchmark.description: Benchmark your role's market competitiveness in three simple steps.

1.heading: Define the Role
1.body: Enter the job title, target location, and offered salary. We map the position to standard industry categories for precise market comparison.

2.heading: Data Cross-Referencing
2.body: We query our live database of 700,000+ UK salary benchmarks, combining official ONS data with real-time market demand to see how your offer stacks up.

3.heading: Get the MCA Verdict
3.body: Receive an instant alignment score. Find out if your offer is under-valued, fair value, or market-leading to ensure you attract and retain top talent.
